arts.ttl: Chelsea's top four hopes dented by Brentford
arts.sum: Chelsea were held to a 0-0 draw by their west London neighbours Brentford on Sunday denting their hopes of Champions League qualification next season.

arts.ttl: Thomas Frank responds to 'biased' Enzo Maresca after Chelsea claim following draw with Brentford
arts.sum: Maresca claimed Blues did enough to win match but Brentford boss disagreed

arts.ttl: Unfair scheduling was to blame for Cole Palmer starting on bench – Enzo Maresca
arts.sum: Chelsea had 24 hours less than Brentford to prepare for the west London derby, having played Tottenham at home on Thursday.

arts.ttl: Chelsea loanee ‘expected’ for Club World Cup – No further talks held over deal
arts.sum: Renato Veiga is destined to make a return to Chelsea for the 2025 Club World Cup as Juventus have not reached out to discuss a permanent deal. Despite new head coach, Igor Tudor, coming in, the Portuguese player is expected back at Stamford Bridge in the summer. The new coach has ambitions to lead Juve The post Chelsea loanee ‘expected’ for Club World Cup – No further talks held over deal appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: Chelsea fans have a lot to say about Christopher Nkunku after 0-0 draw with Brentford
arts.sum: Christopher Nkunku had a lot of Chelsea fans talking during the Blues’ 0-0 draw with Brentford on Sunday afternoon. With Nicolas Jackson fit again, Nkunku...

arts.ttl: Brentford should have beaten Chelsea - Frank
arts.sum: Brentford head coach Thomas Frank says his side should have beaten Chelsea as the Bees played out a goalless draw with their London rivals.

arts.ttl: Chelsea performance pleases Maresca despite goalless draw
arts.sum: Chelsea head coach Enzo Maresca says he was "pleased" with his much-changed side's performance despite the draw at Brentford denting their bid to reach next season's Champions League.

arts.ttl: Brentford 0-0 Chelsea: Match report & 3 talking points from hard-fought stalemate
arts.sum: Match report and talking points from Brentford 0-0 Chelsea in the Premier League.

arts.ttl: Chelsea next five fixtures compared to Champions League rivals as Premier League run-in assessed - Isaac Seelochan - football.london
arts.sum: April 22 vs Aston Villa (H) at 8pm - Premier League Below are Chelsea's next five fixtures as well as those of their rivals for the Champions League places...

arts.ttl: Chelsea player ratings vs Brentford as Nkunku poor and James struggles
arts.sum: Nicolas Jackson was brought on for the second-half, however, and made an immediate difference. Chelsea looked much more dangerous in the second period but still could not find the decisive goal.
